channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDSILHYD] Indsil Hydro Power receives ₹12.09L GST demand, ₹14.61L penalty
item.description:
Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd has received an order from the Superintendent, Central GST & Central Excise, Raipur, demanding payment of ₹12,09,060 towards GST liability under Reverse Charge Mechanism (RCM), along with a penalty of ₹14,60,678 and applicable interest. The order, dated December 31, 2025, alleges excess availment of Input Tax Credit (ITC) and non-payment/short payment of GST under RCM. The company has filed an appeal against this order before the Appellate Authorities and states that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

  • Company received a GST demand of ₹12.09 lakhs under Reverse Charge Mechanism.
  • A penalty of ₹14.61 lakhs and applicable interest were also levied.
  • The order alleges excess Input Tax Credit and GST short payment.
  • Company has filed an appeal against the order with appellate authorities.
  • Management states no material financial or operational impact from the order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDSIL HYDRO POWER AND MANGANESE LTD.-$ | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [ADIEXRE] Trustedge Capital Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Trustedge Capital Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also re-appointed M/s MGP & Associates as Internal Auditors for the financial year ending March 31, 2027, and designated Mr. Somit Bhandari and Mr. Chetan Khosla as Senior Management Personnel.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • M/s MGP & Associates re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Somit Bhandari and Chetan Khosla designated as Senior Management Personnel.
  • Statutory Auditors’ Report issued by M/s Mahendra N. Shah & Co. was noted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADINATH EXIM RESOURCES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SILINV] SIL Investments: FY26 Dividend ₹2.50, Loan Approvals
item.description:
SIL Investments Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. A dividend of ₹2.50 (25%) per equity share has been recommended, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved proposals to grant unsecured loans to several Qualified Bodies Corporate (QBCs), including Sutlej Textiles and Industries Limited and Avadh Sugar & Energy Limited, totaling ₹175 crore. These transactions, classified as Material Related Party Transactions, are subject to shareholder approval.

  • SIL Investments declared audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • A dividend of ₹2.50 per share (25%) was recommended for FY26, pending shareholder approval.
  • Unsecured loans totaling ₹175 crore to related parties were approved, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Standalone revenue from operations for FY26 stood at ₹1,256 Lakhs.
  • The company reported a total comprehensive income of ₹(55,749) Lakhs for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIL INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MTARTECH] MTAR Technologies Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
MTAR Technologies Ltd. announced the approval of audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during its Board of Directors meeting held on May 12, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of M/s. Sagar & Associates as Cost Auditors and Ms. Seshachalam & Co. as Internal Auditors for the upcoming three financial years. The Statutory Auditors, M/s S.R. Batliboi & Associates LLP, issued an Audit Report with an unmodified/unqualified opinion on the financial results.

  • MTAR Technologies approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Sagar & Associates appointed as Cost Auditors for 3 FYs (2026-27 to 2028-29).
  • Seshachalam & Co. appointed as Internal Auditors for 3 FYs (2026-27 to 2028-29).
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the FY26 financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MTAR Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AEL] Amba Enterprises Recommends 15% Final Dividend
item.description:
Amba Enterprises Ltd's board has approved the audited financials for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of 15% (₹0.75 per share) subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM. The record date for dividend eligibility is set for June 19, 2026. The AGM is scheduled for June 30, 2026, via video conferencing. The board also approved the re-appointment of U.D. Kachare & Co. as Internal Auditor and Sark & Associates LLP as Secretarial Auditor.

  • Final dividend of 15% (₹0.75 per share) recommended for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is June 19, 2026.
  • AGM scheduled for June 30, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • U.D. Kachare & Co. re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Sark & Associates LLP re-appointed as Secretarial Auditor for 5 years.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amba Enterprises Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SHILINDORE] Sayaji Hotels Board Meeting on May 16, 2026
item.description:
Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 16, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 16, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Indore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NEULANDLAB] Neuland Labs Q4FY26 Total Income 788.7 Cr, EBITDA 319.4 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Neuland Laboratories Limited announced robust financial results for Q4 FY26 and the full year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, Total Income surged 134.9% year-on-year to 788.7 crore, while EBITDA soared 448.6% to 319.4 crore, with the EBITDA margin expanding to 40.5%. Profit After Tax (PAT) dramatically increased by 666.3% year-on-year to 212.5 crore. For the full year FY26, the company reported a Total Income of 2053.1 crore and an EBITDA of 603.4 crore. CEO Mr. Saharsh Davuluri highlighted strong business visibility for the short to medium term, driven by commercial and near-commercial molecules, and confirmed ongoing investments in Peptide Manufacturing and a new R&D Centre for future growth. An earnings call is scheduled for May 12, 2026.

  • Q4FY26 Total Income grew 134.9% YoY to 788.7 crore.
  • Q4FY26 EBITDA jumped 448.6% YoY to 319.4 crore.
  • Q4FY26 Profit After Tax increased 666.3% YoY to 212.5 crore.
  • Full year FY26 Total Income reached 2053.1 crore.
  • CEO notes strong business visibility and future growth investments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NEULAND LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [RAJOIL] Raj Oil Mills: ₹9.2 Cr Preferential Issue Approved
item.description:
Raj Oil Mills Ltd's board approved a preferential issue to raise up to ₹9.2 crore through the issuance of up to 10,00,000 equity shares and 10,00,000 convertible warrants, each at ₹46, including a premium of ₹36. The issue is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The relevant date for determining the issue price was May 12, 2026. Post allotment, the paid-up equity share capital will increase to ₹16,98,86,840.

  • Raj Oil Mills plans to raise ₹9.2 Cr via preferential issue.
  • Issue includes up to 10 Lakh equity shares and 10 Lakh warrants at ₹46 each.
  • Warrants are convertible into equity shares within 18 months.
  • Issue price includes a premium of ₹36 per share/warrant.
  • Post-allotment equity share capital to increase to ₹16.99 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAJ OIL MILLS LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [LYKALABS] Lyka Labs Board Meeting Scheduled for May 25, 2026
item.description:
Lyka Labs Ltd has announced a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 25, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The announcement was made to the BSE as per Regulation 29(1)(a) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The information is also available on the company's website.

  • Lyka Labs board meeting set for May 25, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Standalone and consolidated results will be considered.
  • Announcement made to BSE as per SEBI regulations.
  • Details available on Lyka Labs website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LYKA LABS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COMPUAGE] Compuage Infocom: 25th COC Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Compuage Infocom Ltd has announced the 25th meeting of the Committee of Creditors (COC) will be held on May 14, 2026, at 04:00 P.M. This is pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Compuage Infocom Limited is currently undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process.

  • Compuage Infocom's 25th COC meeting is scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • The meeting is in compliance with SEBI's LODR regulations.
  • Compuage is under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process.
  • Gajesh Labhchand Jain is the Resolution Professional.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COMPUAGE INFOCOM LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
